level1_segments.summary: The assistant surgeon calibrates and manipulates the Mako robotic arm while holding a bone saw, with brief pauses in between.
The assistant surgeon holds surgical instruments and prepares the instrument table while intermittently calibrating the robotic arm.
The assistant surgeon cleans the patient while holding a surgical instrument.
The assistant surgeon prepares the instrument table and handles a surgical drape.
The assistant surgeon assists the scrub nurse and prepares the patient while handling surgical drapes and instruments, interspersed with brief pauses.
The assistant surgeon prepares the patient and instruments, assists the scrub nurse, and handles surgical drapes and the monitor.
The assistant surgeon engages in intermittent tasks involving holding drapes, preparing the instrument table, and preparing the patient.
The assistant surgeon holds a surgical instrument and touches the patient for an extended duration.
The assistant surgeon performs brief patient contact and instrument handling with short pauses in between.
The assistant surgeon briefly touches the patient followed by a long period of inactivity.
The assistant surgeon engages in continuous patient contact with a very short pause.
The assistant surgeon performs intermittent patient contact and instrument handling with brief pauses.
The assistant surgeon holds a surgical instrument and touches the patient to prepare for the next step.
The assistant surgeon picks up a drill, performs drilling on the patient, and briefly pauses before touching the patient again.
The assistant surgeon uses a surgical instrument to suture the patient and continues touching the surgical site.
After a brief pause, the assistant surgeon touches the patient and then manipulates the operating table.
The assistant surgeon alternates between holding instruments, preparing the patient, and touching the patient to finalize the procedure.
The assistant surgeon briefly holds an instrument and prepares the patient before a short pause.
The assistant surgeon manages the surgical drape and performs patient preparation tasks.
The assistant surgeon touches and then manipulates the operating table.

level2_segments.summary: The assistant surgeon performs initial setup tasks including robotic arm calibration, instrument table preparation, and patient draping.
The assistant surgeon engages in extended periods of patient contact and instrument handling to support the main surgical procedure.
The assistant surgeon assists with drilling, suturing, and final patient preparation tasks to conclude the procedure.

level1_segments.summary: The circulator nurse intermittently assists the scrub nurse and holds surgical instruments with brief pauses between activities.
The circulator nurse assists the assistant surgeon with brief pauses in between.
The circulator nurse holds surgical instruments and assists the scrub nurse in a continuous sequence.
The circulator nurse has a brief moment of holding an instrument surrounded by periods of inactivity.
The circulator nurse manipulates the operating table.
The circulator nurse prepares the patient and briefly handles surgical instruments with short pauses in between.
The circulator nurse assists the head surgeon intermittently with brief periods of inactivity.
The circulator nurse performs sporadic tasks including holding instruments and assisting the assistant surgeon and robot technician, separated by long idle periods.
The circulator nurse manipulates the C-arm and scans the patient to support imaging procedures.

The circulator nurse focuses on patient preparation, operating table manipulation, and direct assistance to the head surgeon.
The circulator nurse performs sporadic support tasks for the assistant surgeon and robot technician, followed by manipulating the C-arm for patient imaging.

level1_segments.summary: The head surgeon prepares the patient and performs initial tissue manipulation using surgical instruments.
The head surgeon drills into the patient's bone using a drill, with brief pauses to adjust the instrument.
The head surgeon hammers an implant into place and continues to manipulate the surgical site with instruments.
The head surgeon performs preparatory tissue manipulation and instrument handling before engaging the robotic system.
The head surgeon calibrates the Mako robotic arm and executes a prolonged bone sawing procedure on the patient.
Following the sawing, the surgeon inspects the site and uses a hammer to adjust or secure the bone structure.
The head surgeon performs initial hammering and touching of the patient with brief pauses in between.
The head surgeon manipulates surgical instruments and touches the patient before a short idle period.
The head surgeon resumes hammering and touching the patient, interspersed with brief pauses and a final idle period.

level2_segments.summary: The head surgeon performs initial patient preparation, manual bone drilling, and implant insertion using standard surgical instruments.
The surgeon prepares the surgical site and utilizes the robotic system to calibrate the arm and execute precise bone sawing.
Following the robotic procedure, the surgeon inspects the site and performs final adjustments and securing of the bone structure through hammering and manual manipulation.

level1_segments.summary: The surgical instrument is held by the robot technician for an extended initial period.
The instrument is actively passed back and forth between the circulator nurse and the scrub nurse with brief pauses.
Following a long idle gap, the instrument resumes a pattern of frequent exchanges between the circulator and scrub nurses.
The surgical instrument is repeatedly transferred between the circulator and scrub nurses during a preparation phase.
The scrub nurse hands the instrument to the robot technician, who then holds it alone.
The instrument is passed back to the scrub nurse and then transferred to the robot technician for a period of use.
The robot technician returns the instrument to the scrub nurse, who holds it for an extended duration.
The instrument is briefly held by the circulator nurse before being returned to the scrub nurse for a long hold.
The surgical instrument is passed between the assistant surgeon, scrub nurse, and robot technician during a brief exchange sequence.
The instrument undergoes a series of transfers involving the assistant surgeon, scrub nurse, and circulator nurse with a long idle period in between.
The scrub nurse and assistant surgeon coordinate the instrument before handing it to the head surgeon for use.
The head surgeon actively uses the instrument for cutting while the assistant surgeon and scrub nurse assist with holding and transferring it.
The surgical instrument is passed between the assistant surgeon, head surgeon, and scrub nurse during a collaborative preparation phase.
The instrument undergoes a series of rapid handoffs among the head surgeon, assistant surgeon, and scrub nurse before being held by the scrub nurse.
The head surgeon utilizes the instrument for an extended period while coordinating with the scrub nurse, followed by a brief transfer to the assistant surgeon and back to the scrub nurse.
The instrument is actively used by the head surgeon with assistance from the scrub nurse, concluding with the scrub nurse holding the tool.
The surgical instrument is briefly held by the head surgeon and scrub nurse before being used solely by the head surgeon.
The scrub nurse holds the instrument during a short interval following a long idle period.
The instrument undergoes a series of transfers between the head surgeon and scrub nurse, including a prolonged period where the scrub nurse holds it.
The instrument is actively passed among the assistant surgeon, circulator nurse, scrub nurse, and robot technician in a complex sequence of handoffs and shared holding.
The surgical instrument is actively passed between the assistant surgeon, scrub nurse, circulator nurse, and robot technician for preparation and setup.
The surgical instrument is held by the scrub nurse following a significant idle period.

level2_segments.summary: The instrument undergoes initial handling by the robot technician followed by extensive exchanges between the circulator and scrub nurses during the early preparation phase.
The tool is transferred between the scrub nurse and robot technician for brief usage periods, interspersed with extended holding times by the nursing staff.
A complex sequence of handoffs involving the assistant surgeon, scrub nurse, and circulator nurse prepares the instrument for the head surgeon's use.
The head surgeon actively utilizes the instrument for cutting and procedural tasks while coordinating closely with the assistant surgeon and scrub nurse.
Following a brief pause, the instrument enters a final phase of complex transfers among the surgical team for setup and preparation before being held by the scrub nurse.

level1_segments.summary: The robot technician performs initial setup and calibration of the Mako robotic arm and infrared tracker, interspersed with brief pauses and workstation interactions.
The robot technician resumes manipulating the robotic arm and then interacts with the MPS workstation.
The robot technician interacts with the MPS workstation with brief pauses in between.
The technician calibrates and manipulates the Mako robotic arm before returning to the MPS workstation.
The technician briefly holds a surgical instrument with long pauses in between.
The technician assists the scrub nurse and manipulates the robotic arm with intermittent short pauses.
The technician briefly assists the assistant surgeon before a long period of inactivity.
The technician manipulates the MPS workstation and infrared tracker with brief pauses.
The robot technician manipulates the infrared tracker and briefly checks the workstation with short pauses in between.
The technician performs a sequence of tasks involving the MPS workstation, robotic arm, and holding a surgical instrument with brief idle gaps.
The technician briefly interacts with the workstation and robotic arm separated by short pauses.
The technician experiences a long idle period with a brief touch of the workstation in the middle.
The technician handles a surgical drape, assists the surgeon, and manipulates the infrared tracker with short pauses.
The robot technician performs initial manipulations and touches on the MPS workstation after a period of inactivity.
The robot technician briefly manipulates the infrared tracker before pausing.
The robot technician engages in an extended session of manipulating and touching the MPS workstation with brief pauses.
The robot technician alternates between manipulating the Mako robotic arm and the MPS workstation over a long duration.
The robot technician concludes the sequence by touching and manipulating the MPS workstation.
The robot technician interacts with the MPS workstation, including a brief pause, to perform setup or configuration tasks.
The robot technician manipulates the Mako robotic arm with a short pause in between.
The robot technician performs a series of interactions with the MPS workstation interspersed with brief pauses.
The robot technician alternates between manipulating the Mako robotic arm and holding a surgical instrument.
The robot technician alternates between holding a surgical instrument and manipulating the Mako robotic arm with short idle gaps.

level2_segments.summary: The robot technician performs the initial setup, calibration, and manipulation of the Mako robotic arm and infrared tracker.
The technician assists the surgical team with instruments and drapes while intermittently managing the robotic arm and workstation.
An extended phase of continuous interaction with the MPS workstation and robotic arm to configure the system for the procedure.
The technician finalizes system configuration and actively manipulates the robotic arm and surgical instruments during the procedure.

level1_segments.summary: The scrub nurse continuously prepares the instrument table and handles various surgical instruments, including a drill, with brief pauses in between.
The scrub nurse prepares the instrument table by organizing and holding various surgical instruments.
The scrub nurse manipulates the Mako robotic arm while holding surgical instruments and a bone saw.
The scrub nurse assists the assistant surgeon while holding instruments and briefly returning to prepare the instrument table.
The scrub nurse alternates between holding instruments and preparing the table while actively assisting the assistant surgeon.
After a brief pause, the nurse resumes preparing the instrument table and handling various tools including a drill.
The nurse transitions from an idle state to manipulating the Mako robotic arm and handling surgical instruments.
Following a short break, the nurse engages in an extended period of preparing the instrument table and holding surgical instruments.
The scrub nurse prepares the instrument table and handles surgical instruments with brief pauses in between.
The scrub nurse manipulates the Mako robotic arm while intermittently holding surgical instruments.
The scrub nurse prepares the instrument table and handles surgical drapes while assisting with patient preparation.
The scrub nurse alternates between holding instruments, preparing the table, and managing drapes for the patient.
The scrub nurse manages surgical drapes and instruments while preparing the instrument table and the patient.
The scrub nurse actively assists the head surgeon by holding instruments and organizing the instrument table with brief pauses.
The scrub nurse continues to prepare the instrument table and assist the head surgeon by holding surgical instruments.
The scrub nurse continuously assists the head surgeon and prepares the instrument table while holding various surgical instruments and a drill.
The scrub nurse actively assists the head surgeon by holding instruments and preparing the instrument table with brief pauses in between.
The scrub nurse focuses on preparing the instrument table with intermittent short idle periods.
The scrub nurse briefly assists the surgeon and prepares instruments before returning to a long idle state.
The scrub nurse performs sporadic instrument table preparations separated by significant idle gaps.
The scrub nurse actively prepares the instrument table, holds various surgical instruments and a hammer, and assists the head surgeon with brief pauses in between.
The scrub nurse prepares the instrument table and assists the surgical team by holding various instruments and a hammer.
The scrub nurse touches the patient and assists the assistant surgeon with brief pauses in between.
The scrub nurse prepares instruments and assists the assistant surgeon while briefly touching the patient.
The scrub nurse performs suturing on the patient and continues to touch the patient.
The scrub nurse prepares the instrument table and holds surgical instruments while briefly assisting the assistant surgeon.
The scrub nurse continues to prepare the instrument table and hold surgical instruments with brief pauses in between.

level2_segments.summary: The scrub nurse performs initial setup by continuously preparing the instrument table and organizing various surgical tools.
The nurse alternates between manipulating the Mako robotic arm, assisting the surgical team, and maintaining the instrument table during the active procedure.
The scrub nurse focuses on patient preparation by managing surgical drapes and organizing instruments.
The nurse provides continuous assistance to the head surgeon by holding instruments and managing the instrument table.
The scrub nurse engages in sporadic instrument table preparation interspersed with significant idle periods.
The nurse actively assists the surgical team by holding instruments, using a hammer, and touching the patient.
The scrub nurse performs suturing on the patient and continues to prepare instruments and assist the team for the final stages.

level1_segments.summary: The robotic system undergoes a comprehensive preoperative calibration sequence including arm status, homing, accuracy, brake, and angle discrepancy checks.
The surgeon performs initial surgery planning and bone registration followed by an extended preoperative RIO check involving patient timeouts.
After a significant pause, the workflow resumes with bone registration and intraoperative planning.
The surgeon executes a detailed bone preparation phase involving multiple surface, anterior, and distal cuts interspersed with continuous RIO verification checks.
The system performed pre-operative RIO checks and bone preparation for both anterior and posterior aspects of the femur.
The surgeon engaged in intra-operative planning on the robot monitor.
The system displayed the finish state indicating the completion of the current phase.
The system transitioned to the start state, likely initiating a new phase or procedure.

level2_segments.summary: The robotic system undergoes comprehensive preoperative calibration, initial surgery planning, and bone registration followed by extended RIO checks.
The workflow resumes with bone registration and intraoperative planning, followed by detailed femoral bone preparation and continuous RIO verification.
The system displays the completion of the current phase and transitions to a new start state.

robot setup (physical): Initial Calibration by MPS

active_predicates: Dressing the robot, to make it sterile
level0_segments.description: robot setup (physical): Dressing the robot, to make it sterile
robot setup (physical): Install base array by nurse
robot setup (physical): Install calibration array
robot setup (physical): Remove calibration Array
robot setup (physical): Install actual Saw tip

level1_segments.summary: The robot is powered on and undergoes initial calibration by the MPS.
The robot is dressed for sterility, followed by the installation and removal of calibration arrays and the final attachment of the saw tip.

level2_segments.summary: The robot undergoes initial power-on calibration, followed by sterile draping and the installation of surgical tools.

level1_segments.summary: The bone saw is held by the scrub nurse while idle.
The bone saw is held by the assistant surgeon while idle.
The head surgeon holds and uses the bone saw to perform cutting actions with brief pauses.

level2_segments.summary: The bone saw remains idle while being held by the scrub nurse and then the assistant surgeon before active use.
The head surgeon actively uses the bone saw to perform cutting actions on the bone.
